summary: All green: build clean, 405/405 unit (incl. dom-runtime-parity 37/37), 85/85 e2e (after fixing one stale test-correlation issue, TEST-001, not a product regression), CLI 0.6.4, byte-deterministic renders, and hands-on visual verification (architecture.mmd + gallery + sequence, clean/sketch x light/dark/fancy) confirms the hard acceptance bar: routed-edge labels sit off their line with the line reading continuous, no label/node or label/label overlaps, sequence labels tightened. Interactive check via the bundled gogo-playwright MCP ran successfully (no fallback needed). Advance to report.
